---
title: "Blog"
# listing:
#   contents: posts
#   sort: "date desc"
#   type: default
#   categories: true
#   sort-ui: false
#   filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

# ✍️ Blog

# Here, I write about **AI, Robotics, and Research Reflections**.

listing:
  contents:
    - posts
    - "!posts/g_dino_explained"
    - "!posts/ResearchLanguage"
    - "!posts/mcmc"
    - "!posts/multi-timescale-rl"
    - "!posts/visual-reasoning"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true

---
